step1:
Step #1: Sign up for Client ID.
Default Home Connect User Account for Testing = Your email address in the HomeConnect app.
Account Type = Individual
step2:
Step #2: Register the ioBroker app.
Application ID = ioBroker.
OAuth Flow = Device Flow.
Default Home Connect User Account for Testing = Your email address in the HomeConnect app.
step3:
Step #3: Enter your Client ID here, save and close.
After starting the adapter, a verification URL will appear in the log.
Open this URL in your browser, login and approve.
DisableFetchConnect: Disable fetching programs when connecting (reduces rate limit)
Own Request: Objects for your own HTTP requests create
